creator: andy@neu.net
text:
FreeBSD BSD_12 12.0-CURRENT FreeBSD 12.0-CURRENT #44 r335389: Tue Jun 19 19:26:45 EDT 2018     root@BSD_12:/usr/obj/usr/src/amd64.amd64/sys/MYKERNEL  amd64 1200069

After a recent update(not sure to what) VLC fails to start.

I rebuilt all xcb* apps, several qt apps and VLC and it is still broken.

in "".

Available platform plugins are: bsdfb, minimal, offscreen, vnc, xcb.

Reinstalling the application may fix this problem.
Abort trap (core dumped)
